nasb.text: But with righteousness He will judge the poor, And decide with fairness for the afflicted of the earth; And He will strike the earth with the rod of His mouth, And with the breath of His lips He will slay the wicked.

esv.text: but with righteousness he shall judge the poor, and decide with equity for the meek of the earth; and he shall strike the earth with the rod of his mouth, and with the breath of his lips he shall kill the wicked.

cnv.text: 卻要以公義審判貧窮人， 以正直判斷地上的困苦人； 以口中的杖擊打世界， 以嘴裡的氣殺死惡人。

ccb.text: 而是按公义审判贫穷人， 以公正为受苦者断案。 他必用口中的杖击打世界， 以嘴里的气杀戮恶人。

csbs.text: 他必以公义审断贫弱者， 以正直裁决世上的卑微人； 以口中的杖击打世界， 以嘴里的气杀死恶人。
